# AI Personal Agent SDK

A comprehensive AI-powered personal assistant SDK with enterprise-grade security, beautiful UI, and seamless integrations.

## Key Features
- 🤖 AI-powered automation with OpenAI GPT-4
- 🔒 End-to-end encryption and permission-based access
- 🎨 Beautiful responsive web UI
- 🔗 Google (Gmail/Calendar) and Zapier integrations
- 📱 24/7 monitoring and intelligent planning
- ⚡ Local data processing with zero external data leakage

## Quick Start
1. Set up your OpenAI API key in `.env`
2. Run `python examples/basic_usage.py`
3. Open http://localhost:8080 in your browser

## Security First
- All data encrypted locally with AES-256
- Permission requests for all sensitive operations
- No data sent to external servers without approval
- Continuous security monitoring and alerts
